title: niemeyera balansae
intro: Niemeyera balansae, also known as Balansa's Niemeyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of New Guinea and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain. Niemeyera balansae is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
